behaviors.description: Block storing a PASS review summary when any stored dimension finding in the same round is FAIL.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is between summary-write logic and findings storage/query for the same round (module handoff/state consistency), not a single pure function. Rejected System because behavior text only requires checking stored findings, not real OS/network/subprocess. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no dependence on model output or multi-agent sequence is described.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary service + findings repository (test DB/in-memory persistence). Seed one round with at least one FAIL dimension, attempt to store PASS summary, assert write is rejected and error references conflicting stored finding.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation uses stored per-dimension findings directly, not only handwritten summary text.
behaviors.justification: Real failure appears when gate computation module and persistence layer interact; a pure unit test of parser/logic could miss data-source precedence bugs. Rejected System: no real infrastructure requirement in behavior text. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: verdict source-of-truth check is deterministic and not model-output quality dependent.
behaviors.test_description: Compose gate service with repository and summary input. Store findings containing FAIL, pass a conflicting summary text claiming all PASS, run gate verdict, assert verdict follows stored findings (not summary text).

behaviors.description: Manual summary overrides require explicit override flag and emit an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: This is policy enforcement plus audit side-effect across modules (request handling/policy + audit persistence). Rejected Unit because missing cross-module side-effect risk. Rejected System since behavior does not require real external logging infra. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model judgment dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Use override endpoint/service with audit store wired. Submit manual override without flag (assert rejected), then with explicit flag (assert accepted) and verify warning/audit record persisted with actor, round, and timestamp fields.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, PASS finalization requires a review-round identifier produced after the latest fix commit.
behaviors.justification: Core risk is stale-state validation across commit metadata and review-round metadata in orchestration/storage layers. Rejected System because behavior text does not require real git subprocess semantics; commit/round ordering can be validated with deterministic fixtures. Rejected Agentic/Workflow since requirement is freshness metadata, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Set up fix-commit metadata and review-round records in test persistence. Attempt PASS finalization with pre-fix round id (assert blocked), then with post-fix round id (assert allowed). Include ordering/lineage checks in assertions.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a live review-agent round on updated diff; mocking the agent call can hide failures where gating incorrectly treats non-run/stale agent outcomes as fresh. Rejected Workflow because this behavior needs one real agentic decision/run freshness check, not multiple agentic steps chained. Rejected Integration per LLM-DEP default for real AI call path in live loop.
behaviors.test_description: Run an end-to-end live review-loop test with real review-agent invocation on an updated diff. First attempt finalize PASS without running fresh agent round (assert blocked). Then run fresh agent round and assert finalization gate evaluates using that new round id.

behaviors.description: If rounds are exhausted and stored results still contain unresolved MUST-FIX findings, outcome is escalation (not PASS).
behaviors.justification: Deterministic policy over persisted findings + round counter; failure boundary is orchestration between round-tracking and stored results modules. Rejected System: no real OS/network/subprocess needed. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: decision depends on stored MUST-FIX flags, not real model-output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Wire round manager + findings store + gate policy. Seed exhausted-round state with unresolved MUST-FIX findings, execute final gate decision, assert escalation state emitted and PASS forbidden.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly targets a live multi-round workflow, i.e., sequential rounds with gating across stages; real failure emerges from cross-round handoff and terminal policy after repeated agent cycles. Rejected Agentic because this is not a single model step; text requires multi-round sequence ('live multi-round review workflow'). Rejected Integration because mocking sequence boundaries can hide orchestration defects across rounds.
behaviors.test_description: Execute full live pipeline across multiple review rounds (planner/reviewer rounds + gating). Drive rounds to exhaustion while keeping at least one unresolved MUST-FIX in stored outcomes, then assert terminal result is escalation and PASS remains blocked.
